content_body: We arrived on Friday, January 30th after getting married in Atlanta! This cabin is a lovely honeymoon weekend getaway. We have spent the weekend mostly relaxing and enjoying our new marriage journey. Watching the sunrise from the master bedroom balcony has been amazing. It is also a wonderful place to read the Bible. The hiking in the area is fun too. I keep watching out for Bears! My husband and I will be returning soon. Thank you so much!
title: Honeymoon Weekend Getaway
